name: care-team-list
title: Care Team List
description: Overlapping avatar group of the care team with a per-member role/status/contact popover.

props.name: members
props.description: { name, role, specialty?, status?, avatarSrc?, contact? }[].

props.name: max
props.description: Avatars shown before collapsing the rest into a +N overflow popover.

clinicalNotes: Role labels are load-bearing and always rendered as text — "attending" vs "resident" vs "named nurse" changes who is accountable, so the role is never implied by avatar or color alone and each avatar's accessible name includes name, role, and availability. Availability (on-call/available/busy) is shown both as a presence dot and as a text label. Contact actions are a caller-supplied slot; the component makes no assumption about how a member is reached.
notes: medcn-original. Composes avatar (AvatarGroup/AvatarStatus) + badge + popover; +N overflow like allergy-list.
